tasks.description: Ensure the addition of python-yaml to the test job's pacman command does not introduce a measurable delay in CI startup times. The test job must remain extremely fast to provide quick feedback.
Ensure that the now-enabled YAML validation errors from verify_build_profile.sh are cleanly presented in the GitHub Actions log output, helping developers quickly identify syntax issues.
Verify the installation of the python-yaml package from official Arch Linux repositories does not alter execution boundaries or inadvertently expose the CI runner to supply chain attacks.
